retry_reason: refcount_dec unconditionally decrements; if refcount was already zero, calling again is a double-put leading to use-after-free, so retry is never appropriate.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: decrements the reference count of a fuse_req object. After calling this function, the caller must not access the request object if this release drops the count to zero (the object is freed). No return value to check; the caller must ensure that the request is not used after a final put. This function is the release side of the fuse request's reference-count lifecycle.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the reference count of the fuse request via refcount_dec; no other logic.
